name: brandvoca
description: AI-powered brand identity platform. Create brands, generate logos, color palettes, typography, brand names, website UIs, and design systems.

interface.shortDescription: Generate brand strategy and visual identity assets
interface.longDescription: Use BrandVoca to authenticate, inspect brand progress, generate strategy outputs, and create visual assets like palettes, typography, logos, names, and website UI concepts.
defaultPrompt: Log me into BrandVoca and show my current credits
Check what step my brand is on and recommend the next action
Generate new BrandVoca logo ideas for an existing brand
